description: Court record in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Location: Fustat. Dating: 1097–1108 CE, based on the scribe's active dates and the fact that it contains a copy of an earlier legal document which was dated Monday, 29 Av 1408 Seleucid (August 1097 CE). Under the authority of the Nagid Mevorakh b. Saʿadya. Concerns the financial settling between Abū ʿAlī Yefet b. Avraham (Yefet is titled Tifʾeret ha-Qahal) and Abū Yaʿqūb Yequtiʾel b. Moshe ha-Rofe (Yequtiʾel is titled Paqid ha-Soḥarim) after the death of Yefet's brother Yaʾir the judge. ENA NS 48.7 and ENA 4010.17 concern the same case (possible join?). (Information from Moshe Yagur).
description_he: פרוטוקול בית דין בכתב יד הלל בן אלי, פוסטאט, 1097–1108. בעניין הסדר כספי בין יפת בן אברהם ויקותיאל בן משה הרופא לאחר מות אחי יפת.
